title: Architect Manifest
description: Machine-readable structural manifest produced by the /architect skill. Contains all nodes (modules, topics, sections), edges (dependencies, references), and generated Mermaid diagrams.

content_type.description: Classification of the analyzed content. Produced by detect_content.sh.

root.description: Absolute path to the analyzed root directory or file.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this manifest was generated.

depth.description: Depth used when generating this manifest. 'essentials' has no per_node diagrams; 'deep' has full per-node detail.

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues encountered during analysis (e.g., unreadable paths, binary-heavy directories, permission errors).

nodes.description: Structural nodes: modules, services, libraries, configs, topics, sections, or concepts.

id.description: Slug identifier for this node. Used as Mermaid node ID and module file name.

path.description: Relative path from root to this node's directory or file.

description.description: 1-2 sentence description of this node's purpose and responsibility.

files.description: Key files within this node (relative paths).

edges.description: Outbound relationships from this node to other nodes.

type.description: Relationship type. depends-on: this node imports/uses target. consumed-by: target uses this node. extends: this node inherits from target. references: this node links to target. contains: this node is a parent of target.

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation of this relationship.

files.description: Number of files in this node.

complexity.description: Qualitative complexity rating. low: simple utility or config. medium: moderate logic. high: many responsibilities or deep dependencies.

system.description: Full system-level Mermaid diagram showing all nodes and their relationships.

per_node.description: Per-node sub-diagrams showing each node's immediate neighbors. Keys are node IDs.

additionalProperties.description: Mermaid diagram string for this node's neighborhood.

detect_info.description: Raw output from detect_content.sh, preserved for traceability.
